Collaborated closely with frontend, backend, and design teams on the development of an MVP, participating in Sprint Planning, Refinement sessions, and Code Reviews.
Continuously improved the scalability, maintainability, and reusability of the application architecture.
Independently delivered technical solutions while ensuring the quality, reliability, and stability of the developed components.
technologies: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, PostgreSQL, Prisma, VitePress, Swagger, GitHub Actions
